allow: Bash(ssh -i "C:/Users/admin/.ssh/rsin" -p 2200 r_sin_com_usr@r-sin.com "find /var/www/r_sin_com_usr/data/www/r-sin.com -type d -exec chmod 755 {} \\; && find /var/www/r_sin_com_usr/data/www/r-sin.com -type f -exec chmod 644 {} \\; && echo ''Permissions fixed''")

Bash(ssh -i "C:/Users/admin/.ssh/rsin" -p 2200 r_sin_com_usr@r-sin.com "find /etc/nginx /usr/local/nginx -name ''*.conf'' 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l ''r-sin.com'' 2>/dev/null; find /usr/local/fastpanel2 -name ''*.conf'' 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l ''r-sin.com'' 2>/dev/null")
Bash(ssh -i "C:/Users/admin/.ssh/rsin" -p 2200 r_sin_com_usr@r-sin.com "id && php -v 2>/dev/null | head -1 && node -v 2>/dev/null && npm -v 2>/dev/null")

Bash(ssh -i "C:/Users/admin/.ssh/rsin" -p 2200 r_sin_com_usr@r-sin.com "ls /etc/nginx/conf.d/ 2>/dev/null | grep ''r.sin\\|rsin'' ; ls /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/ 2>/dev/null | grep ''r.sin\\|rsin''; ls ~/nginx/ 2>/dev/null; ls ~/conf/ 2>/dev/null")
Bash(ssh -i "C:/Users/admin/.ssh/rsin" -p 2200 r_sin_com_usr@r-sin.com "ls /home/r_sin_com_usr/ 2>/dev/null; ls ~ 2>/dev/null; env | grep -i home")

Bash(ssh -i "C:/Users/admin/.ssh/rsin" -p 2200 r_sin_com_usr@r-sin.com "find ~/www/r-sin.com/nextapp -type f -exec chmod 644 {} \\; && find ~/www/r-sin.com/nextapp -type d -exec chmod 755 {} \\; && echo ''done''")
